_comment: App Update Automation — Central Configuration for Patient Register

app.name: Patient Register
app.description: Offline Patient Register and Sign-in tracker. Manage patient details, check-ins, department visits, and medical records in one place.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Manage patient sign-ins, check-ins, and visitor logs offline.
features: Track patient sign-in records and visit details offline
Record departments, doctors, and patient details securely
Generate professional PDF report summaries and share instantly

pages.settingsCurrencyDescription: Change the display currency for your records and reports.
pages.settingsResetDescription: Wipe all local register files, custom templates, and configuration settings completely.

mobile.name: Patient Register (Mobile)
mobile.description: Patient register sheets optimized for mobile layouts.

tablet.name: Patient Register (Tablet)
tablet.description: Comprehensive patient register sheets optimized for tablets.

desktop.name: Patient Register (Desktop)
desktop.description: Comprehensive patient register sheets optimized for desktop.

pdf.csvShareText: Patient Register data exported as CSV

ios.cameraUsageDescription: Patient Register needs access to your camera to capture records.
ios.photoLibraryUsageDescription: Patient Register needs access to your photo library to attach records.
ios.microphoneUsageDescription: Patient Register needs microphone access when using the camera.
